items.title: Jeff Teague REACTS to Clippers TRADING Kawhi Leonard to Raptors for Brandon Ingram | Club 520
items.author: Club 520 Podcast
items.body_excerpt: Jeff Teague, DJ Wells, and B Hen react to the Los Angeles Clippers trading Kawhi Leonard to the Toronto Raptors for Brandon Ingram, Gradey Dick, and NBA draft picks. Kawhi returns to Toronto where he delivered a championship in his lone season in Canada with hopes of bringing a…

items.title: If the LA Clippers clear the decks of FA cap holds and non-guaranteed salaries, they can create over $31M in cap space this summer. They got off some money by trading Kawhi Leonard to the Toronto Raptors for Brandon Ingram and Gradey Dick.
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt: If the LA Clippers clear the decks of FA cap holds and non-guaranteed salaries, they can create over $31M in cap space this summer. They got off some money by trading Kawhi Leonard to the Toronto Raptors for Brandon Ingram and Gradey Dick.

items.title: Fun little note: Brandon Ingram was traded a year and a half ago for basically Keaton Wagler.
items.author: Jake Shapiro
items.body_excerpt:
Fun little note: Brandon Ingram was traded a year and a half ago for basically Keaton Wagler.

That deal was between the Raptors and Pelicans, involving a Pacers pick and now the two will play for the Clippers together.

The NBA, lol!

items.title: [Fischer] The Raptors and Clippers have held real trade conversations this weekend on sending Kawhi Leonard back to Toronto, according to league sources. Sources say Toronto has expressed a preference in dealing Brandon Ingram to Los Angeles, as opposed to RJ Barrett.
